rationale: Review 2 correctly approves the generality: hypotheses are minimal, field abstraction is appropriate, and the Fintype/rational-real specializations properly derive from the generic version. Review 1's generality-relevant findings (sqrtTower definition and derivation direction) are contested organizational preferences — the ℕ-induction is the natural proof engine and the most general API lemma is present — so acting on either review leaves the PR at essentially the same generality level.
